_comment_features.0~4: Price Momentum  (r1w, r4w, r12w, r26w, r52w)
_comment_features.5~10: Technical       (rsi_14, bb_pct, vol_ratio, atr_pct, obv_change, vol_usd)
_comment_features.16~26: Macro/Sentiment (fear_greed, spx_ret, dxy_ret, vix, gold_ret, silver_ret, dji_ret, spx_vol_chg, gold_vol_chg, silver_vol_chg, dji_vol_chg)
_comment_features.27~32: ETF+Polymarket  (btc_etf_inflow_norm, polymarket_btc, btc_etf_inflow_raw, eth_etf_inflow_norm, eth_etf_inflow_raw, btc_etf_vol)
_comment_features.33~43: DeFi+Derivatives (defi_tvl_chg, ethereum_tvl_chg, dex_volume_chg, defi_fees_chg, stablecoin_mcap_chg, aave_tvl_chg, uniswap_tvl_chg, lido_tvl_chg, funding_rate, open_interest_chg, long_short_ratio)

_comment_model_types.ffn: 原版 FEN FFN（向後相容，無交互機制）
_comment_model_types.gated: Gated Interaction FFN（market state 調控 asset features）
_comment_model_types.lightweight: 輕量門控 FFN（§12.5.5，bottleneck + sparse gate + BatchNorm，適合小 N）

_comment_feature_reduce.none: 不做降維（預設，向後相容）
_comment_feature_reduce.pca: PCA 降維，保留 pca_variance 比例的累積變異（§12.5.2）
_comment_feature_reduce.lasso: LASSO 回歸篩選非零係數特徵（§12.5.2）
